cards.name: Bartolomeo
cards.text: DON!! x1 [Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] You may add 1 card from the top of your Life cards to your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards with the {Supernovas} type gains +2000 power during this turn.

cards.name: Bartolomeo
cards.text: [Blocker] [Opponent's Turn] [Once Per Turn] When 1 card is added from your Life cards to your hand by your Leader's effect, set this Character as active. Then, up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards with the {Supernovas} type gains +1000 power during this turn.

cards.name: Bartholomew Kuma
cards.subTypes: Egghead / The Seven Warlords of the Sea / Revolutionary Army
cards.text: [When Attacking] [Once Per Turn] You may return 1 of your Characters to your hand: Look at 1 card from either the top or bottom of your or your opponent's deck, then place it at the top or bottom of the same deck. Then, this Leader gains +1000 power during this battle.

cards.name: Jewelry Bonney
cards.text: [Your Turn] When 1 of your Characters is returned to your hand by your own effects, play this card from your hand rested. Then, you cannot play another Jewelry Bonney from your hand by your effects. [On Play] Draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand. Then, add 1 card from the top of your Life cards to your hand.

cards.name: Pedro
cards.text: [When Attacking] [Once Per Turn] You may rest 1 of your {Minks} Characters: Up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less cannot be rested until the end of your opponent's next turn. [End of Your Turn] If you have 5 rested Characters with the {Minks} type, all of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 7 or less will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase.

cards.name: Pedro
cards.text: [On Play] You may rest 2 of your cards with the {Minks} type: set up to 4 of your DON!! cards as active. [Opponent's Turn] When one of your {Minks} type characters other than this character would be removed from the field, you may rest 2 of your DON!! cards instead.

cards.name: Ms. All Sunday
cards.text: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 2 cards from the top of your deck: give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters -X cost during this turn, where X equals the number of {Baroque Works} cards in your trash. Then, if your opponent has a Character with a cost of 0, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.

cards.name: Ms. All Sunday & Mr. 0
cards.text: If you control a Character with "Crocodile" in its name, this character cannot be removed from the field by your opponent's effects. [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When you return 1 or more DON!! cards on your field to your DON!! deck by one of your effects, you may K.O. up to 1 of your Characters.

cards.name: Monet
cards.text: [When Attacking] [Once Per Turn] You may return 3 DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck: All of your opponent's Characters get -2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.

cards.name: Monet
cards.text: [Blocker] [End of Your Turn] All of your opponent's rested Characters with 4000 power or less will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase.

cards.name: Charlotte Perospero
cards.text: [Once Per Turn] When a card is added to a player's hand from their Life cards, you may look at the top card of your opponent's deck. Then, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.

cards.name: Charlotte Perospero
cards.text: [On Play] Choose a cost and reveal 1 card from the top of your opponent's deck. If the revealed card has the chosen cost, add 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards.

cards.name: Zeff
cards.text: [When Attacking] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 2 cards from the top of your deck: Up to 1 of your {East Blue} or "Sanji" Characters gains [Rush] during this turn. If you have 20 or fewer cards in your deck, then all of your Leader and Character cards with the {East Blue} type or with "Sanji" in their card name gain +1000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.

cards.name: Sanji
cards.text: [On Play] Return 1 DON!! card attached to 1 of your opponent's Characters to its owner's field: Draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand. Then, this Character gains [Rush] during this turn. [When Attacking] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 4 cards from the top of your deck. Then if you did, this Character cannot be removed from the field until the end of your opponent's next turn.
